concepts.label: Democracy
concepts.definition: Government by the people, exercised directly or through elected representatives

concepts.label: Direct Democracy
concepts.definition: Citizens vote directly on laws and policies without intermediaries

concepts.label: Representative Democracy
concepts.definition: Citizens elect representatives to make political decisions on their behalf

concepts.label: Parliamentary Democracy
concepts.definition: Democratic system where executive derives legitimacy from legislature

concepts.label: Presidential Democracy
concepts.definition: Democratic system with separately elected president as head of state and government

concepts.label: Semi-Presidential System
concepts.definition: System combining a president with a prime minister responsible to legislature

concepts.label: Constitutional Monarchy
concepts.definition: Monarchy governed by constitution limiting royal authority

concepts.label: Absolute Monarchy
concepts.definition: Monarchy where the ruler has unrestricted political power

concepts.label: Federal Republic
concepts.definition: Republic with power divided between central and regional governments

concepts.label: Unitary State
concepts.definition: State governed as a single entity with central government supreme

concepts.label: Confederation
concepts.definition: Union of sovereign states united for common action

concepts.label: Theocracy
concepts.definition: Government by religious leaders claiming divine authority

concepts.label: Autocracy
concepts.definition: Government by a single person with unlimited power

concepts.label: Oligarchy
concepts.definition: Government by a small elite group

concepts.label: Plutocracy
concepts.definition: Government by the wealthy

concepts.label: Aristocracy
concepts.definition: Government by a hereditary privileged class

concepts.label: Meritocracy
concepts.definition: System where advancement is based on ability and talent

concepts.label: Technocracy
concepts.definition: Government by technical experts and specialists

concepts.label: Anarchy
concepts.definition: Absence of government and absolute individual freedom

concepts.label: Totalitarianism
concepts.definition: Government with total control over public and private life

concepts.label: Authoritarianism
concepts.definition: Government with strong central power and limited political freedoms

concepts.label: Military Junta
concepts.definition: Government led by a committee of military leaders after a coup

concepts.label: One-Party State
concepts.definition: State where only one political party has the right to govern

concepts.label: Communist State
concepts.definition: State governed by a communist party under Marxist-Leninist ideology

concepts.label: Socialist State
concepts.definition: State constitutionally dedicated to establishing socialism

concepts.label: Fascism
concepts.definition: Authoritarian ultranationalist political ideology with dictatorial power

concepts.label: Federalism
concepts.definition: Division of power between central and constituent political units

concepts.label: Consociationalism
concepts.definition: Power-sharing arrangement in divided societies

concepts.label: Diarchy
concepts.definition: Government with two joint heads of state

concepts.label: Kritarchy
concepts.definition: Government by judges

concepts.label: Stratocracy
concepts.definition: Government by military chiefs

concepts.label: Kleptocracy
concepts.definition: Government by corrupt rulers who exploit the people for personal gain

concepts.label: Timocracy
concepts.definition: Government where only property owners participate

concepts.label: Ochlocracy
concepts.definition: Rule by the mob or mass of people

concepts.label: Ergatocracy
concepts.definition: Government by the working class

concepts.label: Noocracy
concepts.definition: Government by the wise

concepts.label: Corporatocracy
concepts.definition: Economic and political system controlled by corporations

concepts.label: Demarchy
concepts.definition: Government by randomly selected citizens

concepts.label: Political System
concepts.definition: Method of governance and organization of political power
